title: Create: Fluidity
description: More recipes, by way of more fluids! The fun way
body:
Create: Fluidity aims to add recipes for items that could use them, by way of fluids and unique processing lines.

The first update focuses on the Molten Blaze, obtained from blazes, it allows you to create blackstone, magma blocks and the new imperfect debris!

Imperfect debris adds a processing line to make netherite automatable, so take note when considering balance, automation of netherite requires superheating but check images for the exact recipe.


The mod currently adds the following recipes:

# New Recipes
Tuff,
Dripstone,
Blackstone,
Calcite,
Magma Block,
Crying Obsidian,
Glow Ink Sac,
Glow Berries,
Glow Lichen.

# Extra Recipes
Stone,
Ghast Tears,
Glass.

# Fluid Mixing Recipes
Basalt, (Lava and Molten Blaze)
Smooth Basalt, (Lava and Flowing Molten Blaze)
Magma Block, (Water and Molten Blaze)
Blackstone, (Water and Flowing Molten Blaze)
Imperfect Debris (Water and Flowing Molten Blaze **Rare**)

The mod also adds some drinkable fluids, that being Hot Chocolate and Caramel, which will see more uses in future updates.
